name: Salata Horiatiko- Village Salad
recipeInstructions:
If desired, peel tomatoes by pouring boiling water over them for 10 seconds and draining. Peel the tomatoes. Cut into wedges.
Peel cucumbers thinly and halve lengthwise.
Cut pepper and remove white membrane. Halve and cut into thick strips.
Separate onion slices into rings.
Place prepared ingredients in a bowl with olives.
Dressing: Combine olive oil, wine vinegar, chopped oregano or parsley, crushed garlic, salt, and black pepper in a bowl. Beat well or place in a screw-top jar, seal, and shake well. Beat again just before serving.
- Add dressing to salad just before serving.
